hero.subtitle: A modern framework for scalable web apps — fine-grained signals, zero virtual DOM, and a composable ecosystem.

ecosystem.title: One framework, many packages
ecosystem.lead: Adopt incrementally — each package solves one problem and plugs in through providers.

structure.title: A full app in one tree
structure.lead: Landing, nested workspace routes, async queries, URL state, forms, store, i18n, and UI primitives — every EchoJS package wired through providers and feature slices. Open any file.

cta.title: Ready to build with EchoJS?
cta.body: Scaffold a project, wire providers once, and open your first typed route — the same flow as apps/docs and apps/example.

reactivity.description: Signals, computed, effects — the reactive core.

hyperdom.description: Fine-grained DOM runtime without a virtual DOM.

framework.description: App bootstrap, providers, and composition root.

router.description: Type-safe, file-oriented routing for Echo apps.

store.description: Structured state with actions and selectors.

async.description: Signal-native data fetching and cache layer.

network_http.description: Tree-shakeable HTTP client with hooks, retries, and typed responses.

url-state.description: Sync UI state with URL search params.

persist.description: Persist stores and signals to storage.

utils.description: Signal-native composables — sensors, DOM, timing, browser.

ui.description: Accessible UI primitives built on HyperDOM.

devtools.description: Developer tools for debugging Echo applications.

architect.description: Architecture linter — layers, public APIs, import boundaries.

footer.tagline: Signal-first framework for scalable web apps.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.lead: Teams backing EchoJS development — Gold, Silver, and Bronze tiers on the sponsors page.
